name: Middle Tennessee
description_short: Middle Tennessee State University is a public comprehensive university in Murfreesboro offering 300+ academic majors, not a financial services or payday alternative provider.
description_long:
Middle Tennessee State University (MTSU) is a comprehensive public university located in Murfreesboro, Tennessee, at the geographic center of the state. Founded and operating as the largest locally governed university in Tennessee, MTSU serves over 20,000 students across its 500-acre campus. The institution was miscategorized as a payday-alternatives provider, when it is actually an accredited higher education institution offering undergraduate, graduate, and online degree programs.

MTSU provides academic education through 300+ majors and concentrations across multiple colleges and schools. The university offers undergraduate degrees, graduate programs, doctoral degrees, adult degree completion programs, and dual enrollment options. Additionally, MTSU Online delivers 74 fully online majors, concentrations, and certificates for distance learners. The institution provides comprehensive financial aid services, with 80% of students receiving some form of aid, and operates a One Stop center to assist students with educational financing and enrollment processes.

MTSU distinguishes itself as the #1 producer of greater Nashville area graduates and serves as a preferred destination for Tennessee undergraduates, first-generation students, and transfer students. The university has been recognized by The Princeton Review's Best Colleges list for seven consecutive years and appears on rankings from The Wall Street Journal, Forbes, and U.S. News & World Report. MTSU also houses the Charlie and Hazel Daniels Veterans and Military Family Center, one of the largest and most comprehensive military support facilities on a college campus.

This is an educational institution, not a financial services company. While MTSU does assist students with financial aid and education financing, it does not provide consumer finance products such as payday loans, personal loans, credit repair, or any payday alternative services. Any consumer finance categorization is fundamentally inappropriate for a university. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online education through MTSU Online (74 programs)
Dual enrollment for high school students
Student support services and academic advising
Veterans and military family support services
pros: 80% of students receive some form of financial aid
Largest locally governed university in Tennessee with 20,000+ students
#1 producer of graduates for Greater Nashville economy
Recognized by The Princeton Review for seven consecutive years
Comprehensive online education through 74 fully online majors and certificates
Dedicated Veterans and Military Family Center for service members
cons: Not a financial services provider—miscategorized in payday-alternatives
Does not offer consumer finance products or loans
Educational institution only; cannot provide personal loans, credit services, or emergency cash products
No payday alternative lending, debt relief, or credit repair services
Location limited to Murfreesboro campus with no nationwide financial services presence
best_for: High school graduates seeking undergraduate education in Tennessee
First-generation and transfer students pursuing degree completion
Adult learners seeking flexible online degree programs
Military veterans and military family members requiring educational support
diagnosis: This is a public university, not a financial services company, and should not be categorized under any consumer finance category. MTSU offers higher education programs and financial aid administration only. The correct categorization is 'banking' only insofar as universities operate bank accounts and handle student financial aid—it is not a provider of consumer financial products and should be removed from CreditDoc's database entirely.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
